workflow.critical: The workflow execution engine is governed by: {project-root}/_bmad/core/tasks/workflow.xml
You MUST have already loaded and processed: {installed_path}/workflow.yaml
Communicate all responses in {communication_language} and generate all documents in {document_output_language}

This workflow EXTENDS the native create-story workflow. It inherits all context-gathering logic from the base workflow and adds Canvas-specific sections: UAT Script, Automated Checkpoints, and User Feedback & Changes.

step.action: Load and execute the base create-story workflow from {base_workflow}/instructions.xml
This handles: story selection, epic context loading, AC generation, task breakdown, dev notes
After base workflow completes story content, proceed to step 90
Based on the Acceptance Criteria generated by the base workflow, create a UAT Script section
Rules for UAT Script:
- NEVER use technical terms (no "run pytest", "check console", "verify API response")
- Only describe: what to click, what to see, what to type
- Each step must be verifiable by a non-technical user
- Include failure instructions: "If you don't see X, record the StoryID and describe what you see instead"
- Map each UAT step to at least one AC number
For each AC, determine the appropriate test command:
- Backend logic: pytest command with appropriate -k filter
- Frontend component: vitest command
- Integration: e2e test command if applicable
Fill the Automated Checkpoints table with concrete, runnable commands
The User Feedback & Changes section is pre-populated by the template
No additional action needed - it provides the structure for future annotations
Ensure the Feedback Log subsection has the BMAD-ANNO callout comment marker
Verify all Canvas-specific sections are present and well-formed:
- UAT Script has at least as many steps as there are ACs
- Automated Checkpoints table has at least one entry
- User Feedback section structure is intact
- File List section exists (for BMAD native dev-story/code-review compatibility)

template-output.action: Update sprint-status.yaml to mark this story as ready-for-dev
